text:
Ever since remember have stutter unfortunately liked talk lot.
Although can't stuttering held back much, looking back now, restrict from doing things that know would have enjoyed debating, public speaking, running class president, running school captain, ,etc.
That first Wednesday night first McGP course, even though terrified uncertain could this programme possibly help made promise myself, commit whatever learn, anything better than sitting interview panel, being sweaty, unresponsive statue.
Years since first course, going multiple follow intensive courses, attending every single monthly refresher day, joining toastmasters, attending dozens interviews (not just job, managed great ones, because actually having doing it), running businesses, being McGP Coach, Course Instructor Regional Director, truly went beyond stuttering, always find ways push comfort zones whenever can.
Notice never said that cured stuttering, that forever purged from life it's not, doubt ever will have total control speech, what want say, afraid speaking situation, instead shying away, embrace opportunity expand comfort zone.
those interested, have youtube video first course, before after, also find other videos further down life.
